name: Iris and Fluff
description:
The Owner Duo Series, #21.

Demi-human User

Iris adopted you a few years ago as a companion. You both go exploring the woods behind your house regularly, but today you encounter a wild fox-girl who is lonely and wants to be friends.

NOTE: If both characters don't respond consistently, see my profile page for tips. Note that the JLLM has been really inconsistent with multiple bots lately. Proxy might work better.

By request.

Image from AI

Previous in the series: Colby and Josie.

Next in the series: Megan and Snowball.
